overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game (Cyberpunk 2077), following a muscular character with green hair through a futuristic urban environment. The character ascends stairs to an elevated commercial walkway lined with vending machines and neon billboards, then descends to a street level with traffic and vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway ascending to upper commercial level

agents.ego_description: muscular character with green hair walking up concrete stairs, following another character initially then leading

notable_agents.action: shirtless character with green mohawk walking up stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway with yellow painted side walls ascending to upper level
silver metal handrails along the stairway edges
exposed concrete beams and ceiling of the overhead walkway structure
futuristic building exteriors with glass and metal panels visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following a muscular character with green hair ascending a wide concrete stairway in a futuristic urban environment. The stairs are flanked by yellow walls and metal railings, leading up to an elevated commercial walkway. Other pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered commercial promenade with vending machines

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and enters covered upper walkway

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the upper promenade, passing various pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on yellow bench using a device

entered.detail: line of futuristic vending machines with glowing displays and warning symbols
large illuminated advertising screens displaying food and product advertisements
bright yellow seating benches along the left side of the walkway
overhead roof structure with exposed beams and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated covered commercial promenade lined with futuristic vending machines on the right and yellow benches on the left. Large digital billboards display advertisements overhead. The walkway is moderately populated with pedestrians, and glass railings on the left overlook the lower levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway descending from upper level to street

events.description: character begins descending stairs to lower street level

agents.ego_description: character walking down concrete stairs, following other pedestrians descending to street level

notable_agents.action: character in checkered pants and red backpack descending stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway with yellow walls descending to street level
silver metal handrails along the descending stairway

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete stairway with yellow walls and metal handrails, moving from the covered upper walkway down toward street level. Other pedestrians are also descending ahead, and the open street with neon lighting becomes visible at the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with traffic and storefronts

events.description: character exits stairway and emerges onto open street level with vehicle traffic
lighting shifts to vibrant pink and purple neon illumination along the street barriers

agents.ego_description: character walking along city sidewalk next to traffic, passing various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic and futuristic cars
yellow and pink illuminated barriers separating sidewalk from street
brightly lit commercial buildings with large neon signs and advertisements
small vendor stalls and machines at street level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs onto a vibrant city sidewalk at street level, with moving traffic visible on the left. The environment is illuminated by intense pink and purple neon lights from storefronts and barriers. The character continues walking along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and street vendors in this open urban cyberpunk setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a concrete urban stairwell to an elevated promenade before descending back into a neon-lit city street. It begins by following a muscular character with green hair up a wide stairway flanked by yellow walls, moving past oncoming pedestrians toward an upper level. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into a covered commercial walkway lined with futuristic vending machines, yellow benches, and glowing digital billboards overhead. The camera then tracks the character as they descend a second set of concrete stairs, shifting from the sheltered promenade toward the open brightness of the lower city. Finally, the character emerges onto a vibrant sidewalk where the lighting transforms into intense pink and purple neon hues, moving past street vendors and flowing traffic in a dense cyberpunk environment.
